versions.changelog_entry: Initial prompt — multi-model, multi-temperature, topic-stratified AI baseline generation protocol with chain-of-custody measures.

Replaced commercial API models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini) with local Ollama models (Llama 3.1 8B, Mistral 7B, Gemma 2 9B). Added Ollama API integration, preflight check, model digest pinning, and M1 Mac hardware guidance.

Replaced raw httpx Ollama integration with PydanticAI agent architecture (typed deps, structured output, ModelRetry). Added pydantic-evals quality gate with 4 custom evaluators. Added agent tests using TestModel.
